info.name: ServiPal API
info.description:
ServiPal API — Multi-service marketplace platform for Nigeria. Covers food ordering, laundry services, package delivery, product marketplace, escrow payments, and wallet management. Built with FastAPI (Python 3.12+), Supabase, Redis, and Flutterwave payments. Deployed on Google Cloud Run.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a JWT Bearer token. Use the Login request to obtain a token — it is automatically saved to the `authToken` collection variable.

## Roles
- CUSTOMER, DISPATCH, RESTAURANT_VENDOR, LAUNDRY_VENDOR, RIDER, ADMIN, MODERATOR, SUPER_ADMIN

## Base URL
Set the `baseUrl` variable in your active environment.

body.raw:
{
  "business_name": "Mama's Kitchen",
  "description": "Authentic Nigerian cuisine",
  "address": "45 Victoria Island, Lagos",
  "phone_number": "+2348012345678",
  "opening_hours": "08:00",
  "closing_hours": "22:00"
}

{
